name: Essonne (France)
description: A blue field divided by a wavy white diagonal band; the lower hoist strewn with gold fleurs-de-lis, the upper fly bearing a gold sunburst whose rays end in small discs.
history: The fleurs-de-lis recall the royal arms of France, with a wavy band for the river Essonne and a radiant emblem of the modern department.

features.role: semé of fleurs-de-lis in lower hoist
